title: cyathophylla viscosa
intro: Cyathophylla viscosa, also known as sticky leaved Cyathophylla, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its sticky or resinous leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyathophylla viscosa include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications to utilize its medicinal properties.
